title: HTML History & Evolution Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential milestones in the history of the World Wide Web.

questions.question: Which individual is credited with inventing the HTML language?
In what year was the first version of HTML released?
Which HTML version was the first to introduce native and standard support for video and audio playback?
What does 'WHATWG' maintain in modern web development?
options: A 'Living Standard' of HTML that is constantly updated.

questions.question: The 'Browser Wars' of the late 90s saw which companies compete for dominance in web technology?
